rationale: Educ. Code §11.152 grants school district trustees general authority to levy taxes and issue bonds. It does not address homestead exemption amounts, so increasing the exemption does not textually conflict with this provision.
quote: The trustees of an independent school district may levy and collect taxes and issue bonds in compliance with Chapter 45.
_note: No direct textual conflict. Revenue impact on school districts is consequential but not a conflict with §11.152's operative language.
